content_body:
Color My Nest is a birdhouse painting playshop, perfect for any occasion!

Having a birthday party for your child, for your Mom, for your Grandmother, or for yourself? A bachelorette party? Girl's Night Out? Celebrating a friend's new job, marriage, or return to the area? A unique token and experiential keepsake from the mountains?

There are many reasons to come and "color your nest." The time you spend with us will be filled with fun, laughter, and creativity.

Select your birdhouse, colors, and materials, and then color your nest. The cost depends on the birdhouse you choose. Many different sizes, shapes, and accessories are available. 

All of our coloring experiences are two hours in length, unless custom arrangements are made. Playshop sessions start at 11:00 a.m. and 2:00 p.m. Reservations are required.
title: Color My Nest
